# LazyCSVLoader { #mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader }

```python
LazyCSVLoader(csv_path, columns=None)
```

Lazy CSV loader using Polars scan_csv.

Per ADR-006:
- Uses polars.scan_csv() for unevaluated query plan
- .materialize() calls .collect() to return DataFrame
- Falls back to pandas DataFrame when materialized

## Attributes

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [columns](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.columns) | Column names. Creates lazy plan but does not load data. |
| [shape](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.shape) | Shape estimate. Creates lazy plan but does not load data. |

## Methods

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [filter](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.filter) | Add lazy filter condition. |
| [head](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.head) | Add lazy head operation. |
| [materialize](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.materialize) | Force full CSV load and return as pandas DataFrame. |
| [select](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.select) | Add lazy column selection. |
| [tail](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.tail) | Add lazy tail operation. |
| [with_columns](#mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.with_columns) | Add lazy column computation. |

### filter { #mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.filter }

```python
LazyCSVLoader.filter(*args, **kwargs)
```

Add lazy filter condition.

### head { #mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.head }

```python
LazyCSVLoader.head(n=10)
```

Add lazy head operation.

### materialize { #mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.materialize }

```python
LazyCSVLoader.materialize()
```

Force full CSV load and return as pandas DataFrame.

### select { #mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.select }

```python
LazyCSVLoader.select(*args)
```

Add lazy column selection.

### tail { #mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.tail }

```python
LazyCSVLoader.tail(n=10)
```

Add lazy tail operation.

### with_columns { #mertisreader.LazyCSVLoader.with_columns }

```python
LazyCSVLoader.with_columns(*args, **kwargs)
```

Add lazy column computation.
